message:
fix: fail-closed on non-finite regression percentages, use constant-time comparison for bundle IDs

benchmark_suite.rs:
- Add !change_pct.is_finite() guard before threshold comparison in
  detect_regressions() to treat NaN/Inf change percentages as
  regressions rather than silently passing — prevents a class of
  bypass where division-by-zero or degenerate baselines could mask
  genuine performance regressions

repro_bundle_export.rs:
- Replace direct string equality (==) with ct_eq() constant-time
  comparison for bundle_id verification in both replay_bundle() and
  find_bundle() to prevent timing side-channel leakage of bundle
  identifiers during replay integrity checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
